Prediction: Yes

The current visit record indicates the presence of "Other and unspecified hyperlipidemia" as a diagnosis. This suggests that there is an existing lipid disorder that is being recognized, even if it is not specified in detail. Given that this diagnosis is explicitly mentioned, it is reasonable to predict that "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" will be coded in the patient's next hospital visit, as there is clear evidence of an ongoing lipid metabolism issue that is likely to be managed or monitored further.
